creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

Can we get the snappy-java port updated to 1.1.2.6? The net-mgmt/unifi5 port has an update that will be expecting this version. This looks a bit more complicated than i expected with the maven setup and other things required to allow building without internet access.


Thanks!

https://github.com/xerial/snappy-java/releases/tag/1.1.2.6
